items.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
items.summary: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

items.title: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
items.summary: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 為救失聯飛官美軍再損失2架C-130運輸機 行動細節曝光
items.summary: 美軍1架F-15E戰鬥機3日在伊朗境內遭擊落，2名飛行員1獲救1失蹤，不過失聯的上校飛官也在稍早成功救出，營救行動過程也逐漸曝光，美軍佔領附近一處區域構建臨時跑道，運輸機搭載數百...…

items.title: 因應油價上漲 塞內加爾禁止部長層級非必要出訪
items.summary: 伊朗戰火使得全球能源運輸要道荷姆茲海峽封鎖，為了因應能源危機，西非國家塞內加爾宣布部長層級非必要不得出國訪問，總理桑科（Ousmane Sonko）已帶頭實施。  據《美聯社...…

items.title: 川普證實：F-15E失聯飛官已安全 美軍完成高風險救援
items.summary: 美軍一架F-15E「打擊鷹」（Strike Eagle）戰機日前在伊朗境內墜毀，失聯的一名飛官已被尋獲。美國總統川普5日表示，該名機組人員目前「安全無恙」，美軍已完成一項高風險...…
